references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Pontederiaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 255-261
Li, Z-Z, AW Gichira, JK Muchuku, W Li, G-X Wang & J-M Chen. 2021. Plastid phylogenomics and biogeography of the genus Monochoria (Pontederiaceae). Journal of Systematics and Evolution 59: 1027-1039.
Moody, K. 1989. Weeds reported in rice in South and Southeast Asia. IRRI, Philippines

Pellegrini, MOO, CN Horn & RF Almeida. 2018. Total evidence phylogeny of Pontederiaceae (Commelinales) sheds light on the necessity of its recircumscription and synopsis of Pontederia L. PhytoKeys 108: 25-83

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 25 December 2022

species.citation: Mart. , Nov. Gen. Sp. Pl. (Martius) 1 (1824) 9; ≡ Eichhornia crassipes (Mart.) Solms , Monogr. Phan. 4 (1883) 523 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 200; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 255; Type: from Brazil (lecto).
species.distribution: S America. LUZON: Camarines Sur (photos), PALAWAN.
species.notes: Introduced in the tropics and subtropics worldwide. In the Philippines since around 1912 as an ornamental, now an ubiquitous weed clogging water courses all over the country. Water hyacinth. Invasive species (CABI 2017, as Eichhornia crassipes).

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 288; ≡ Monochoria hastata (L.) Solms , Monogr. Phan. 4 (1883) 523 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 141; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 200; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 258; Type: from Sri Lanka (lecto).
species.distribution: Bangladesh, China, India, Java, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Vietnam. LEYTE, MINDANAO: Cotabato.
species.notes: Throughout the Philippines at low and medium elevation; common in open wetlands, swamps, etc. 0-700m.

species.citation: Burm.f. , Fl. Ind. (N. L. Burman) (1768) 80; ≡ Monochoria vaginalis (Burm.f.) C.Presl , Reliq. Haenk. 1 (1827) 128 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 141; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 200; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 256; Type: from India (lecto). = Monochoria vaginalis var. pauciflora (Blume) Merr. , EPFP 1 (1923) 201; ≡ Pontederia pauciflora Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1827) 32.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Australia, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Cambodia, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Laos, Malaysia, Middle East, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Pakistan, Philippines, Russia, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Vietnam. LEYTE (photos), LUZON: Bulacan (photos), Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Kalinga, Mountain Province, NCR, Pampanga, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Zamboanga del Norte (photos), PANAY (photos).
species.notes: Throughout the Philippines; common in periodically inundated or water-logged open waste sites, rice paddies, swamps, etc. 100-2000m.

species.citation: Sw. , Prodr. (Swartz) (1788) 57; ≡ Eichhornia azurea (Sw.) Kunth , Enum. Pl. (Kunth) 4 (1843) 129.
species.notes: Reported for the Philippines by Moody (1989) as a weed in rice, but no specimens cited. Possibly naturalized if indeed present.
